name: Bootsy Baby!
description: The gooey, bubbly sound of Bootsy Collins' Mu-Tron from 70's era P-Funk

name: Sexy Psycho
description: Flea used an EHX Q-Tron with a flat battery for this RHCP classic distorted filter sound

name: Karma-leon
description: Herbie's 1973 funk classic is of course played on an ARP Odyssey, but we can get close - play staccato or palm mute to catch the vibe
